contract_source.expected_solution: Agent identifies well-known type definitions in protobuf The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: timestamp.proto, duration.proto, and struct.proto). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: timestamp, duration, fieldmask, struct, any.proto.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (timestamp.proto, duration.proto, and struct.proto) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: timestamp, duration, fieldmask, struct, and any.proto

direct_consumers.expected_solution: Agent finds gRPC and googleapis consumers of well-known types The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: message_size_filter.cc, httpbody.proto, and status.proto). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: path.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (message_size_filter.cc, httpbody.proto, and status.proto) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: path
Connects the source artifacts to their downstream impact in the consumer code path

compliance_check.expected_solution: Agent identifies contract compliance issues The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: timestamp.proto, message_size_filter.cc, httpbody.proto, duration.proto, struct.proto, and status.proto). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: serializ, json, contract, drift, mismatch, breaking, compat.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (timestamp.proto, message_size_filter.cc, httpbody.proto, duration.proto, struct.proto, and status.proto) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: serializ, json, contract, drift, and mismatch
